name: Sympa API
description: Sympa is an open-source mailing list management (MLM) software. The primary API interface is SOAP/HTTP (WSDL-based). This spec models the SOAP operations as REST-like endpoints for discoverability. In practice, these are SOAP actions sent via POST to the SOAP endpoint URL. Sympa 6.2+ also has a limited REST API for some operations.
